input.command: git add libs/adapter-registry/src/adapter_registry/registry.py libs/model-training/src/model_training/merging.py libs/model-training/tests/test_merging.py libs/shared/src/shared/blackboard.py libs/shared/src/shared/checkpoint_db.py libs/shared/tests/test_blackboard.py libs/shared/tests/test_checkpoint_db.py scripts/swarm.py scripts/swarm_evolution.py tests/test_swarm_evolution.py

git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix: address algorithmic issues from code review

- Fix TIES merge sign election: track keep_mask so trimmed zeros don't
  vote; fall back to averaging all survivors on sign ties instead of
  dropping all values
- Add density validation ([0.0, 1.0]) and drop_rate validation
  ([0.0, 1.0)) with ValueError on out-of-range
- Scope checkpoint DB queries by run_id to prevent cross-run
  contamination (is_completed, mark_completed, mark_failed)
- Catch CycleError in build_execution_layers and fall back to
  single-layer flat execution instead of crashing
- Filter NULL fitness_score in query_best_for_task and evolution_sweep
  to prevent merging unevaluated adapters
- Guard agent_supervisor backoff sleep on consecutive_failures > 0
  to avoid 1s sleep after every successful task

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
